query: Mt Bachelor Nordic Marathon cross country ski race Mt Bachelor Nordic Center

videos.title: Relay @ Mt. Bachelor SLNST
videos.description: The Fire & Ice, Bend Camp's final day included a relay on the Screamer trail with Kristina Strandberg, Torin Koos, and Lars Flora.  Many thanks to Dan Simineau and MBSEF for the great week of instruction and training.

videos.title: Ski Skating an Mt Bachelor Nordic
Nordic skiing at Mt. Bachelor- first attempt at a downhill
Race the Methow
videos.description: A junior nordic qualifier race for the Pacific Northwest. See the latest video at MethowGrist.com.

videos.title: mt bachelor oregon highschool nordic championship 2014
MBSEF Summer Training 07
videos.description: A short film featuring MBSEF and their summer nordic training for the 07-08 season.

videos.title: 10k Cross Country Race Snow Mountain Ranch
videos.description:
Hey! Thanks for watching! This is a  edited down video Snow Mountain Ranch 10k cross country ski race in Tabernash Colorado, pretty much Granby!

Thanks for everyone who helped put this race together and I highly recommend it for anyone next year!

Let me know if you have any questions about the race, skis, gear, conditions, etc. in the comments below. Also any feed back on the video would be great!

Sorry for the wind noise, its a first edition GoPro and the mic on the 360 cam is rough so I tried to hide it with loud songs.

what's up everybody this is the snow
mountain ranch 10k there was a 20k and a
50k earlier that started much earlier
than us and so we get to race on the
same course after they had skied it in a
little bit for us which we were really
thankful for because the night before I
think it snowed about - a little over
two feet it snowed about 18 inches to 2
feet somewhere in there and thank you so
much to the snow mountain ranch grooming
crew cuz they stayed up basically all
night to groom it multiple times to try
and keep the trails skeet in and turned
out to be a really great day and really
fun race so thanks so much for that this
time I'm using a different camera on my
head it's at 360 cameras so afterwards I
can turn the camera at while I'm editing
it and see if I can see anything
interesting and kind of get crazy with
where I'm looking and stuff like that it
I think it turned out pretty cool let me
know what you think so this video is the
start of the 10k and not much else to
say about that let's get into it
[Music]
[Laughter]
[Applause]
and there we go and so I crossed the
line I think it was over 30 minutes for
that 10k news just really fun being out
there with everybody on such a nice day
and if you wanted to know about gear wax
training let me know in the comment
thanks so much for watching I really
appreciate it let me know if you like
these videos and I'll keep them coming
have a great one thing is like what
snowmen have for pets it's like their
version of a chihuahua I guess

videos.title: Minnesota Moment: New Loppet Foundation program to be led by Olympian
videos.description:
It's a new opportunity to get kids outside and active in the Twin Cities.

The Loppet Foundation is growing, and on Wednesday, it announced the creation of a new program called Loppet Run 365.

Full Story Here - https://kstp.com/minnesota-moment/minnesota-moment-new-loppet-foundation-running-program-to-be-led-by-olympian-abdi-bile/5505997/

videos.title: Vermont dominates Nordic Carnival
videos.description: Catamounts win men's and women's races with absence of Dartmouth
